title: ResourceServer path-traversal check misses trailing /.. at end of path
evidence: file_path.find("/../") != std::string::npos || file_path.rfind("/..", 0) == 0 — checks for /../ in the middle and /.. at start, but /valid/path/.. (ending with /..) passes both checks. The file resolves one directory up.
suggestion: Add check for file_path.ends_with("/..") after the existing checks, or check file_path.find("/..") != std::string::npos (though this would reject legitimate paths containing .. in directory names). Low priority since all audio paths come from FileScanner.

notes.text: Added file_path.ends_with("/..") check to path-traversal filter. Catches paths ending with /.. that previously passed the existing checks.
